comment: This file marks the role of this AIAST install. In the parent template repo, role='parent-template'. In any scaffolded downstream app repo, role='downstream-app' and an _system/app-local-namespace.json is required. Bootstrap scripts read this sentinel to refuse cross-role invocations (e.g. init-project on a parent template, or downstream-only checks on the template). See _system/APP_LOCAL_NAMESPACE_CONTRACT.md.
